heading: ENERGY EMPLOYEES OCCUPATIONAL ILLNESS COMPENSATION PROGRAM
label: XVI ENERGY EMPLOYEES OCCUPATIONAL ILLNESS COMPENSATION PROGRAM
notes: CodificationThis subchapter was enacted as title XXXVI of div. C of the Floyd D. Spence National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2001, known as the Energy Employees Occupational Illness Compensation Program Act of 2000, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.
